scope: local Windows desktop Wildberries analytics release candidate

resolved_findings.title: Live UI methods were shadowed by a different MRO implementation
Imported reports were forgotten after restart
Desktop fabricated authority and schema attestations
Desktop self-test could return PASS after nested failure
Tax base was an undeclared hardcoded assumption
WB service rows without SKU blocked or disappeared from economics
Zero-activity groups blocked a valid period
Report index persisted external absolute user paths
XLSX was hashed and parsed from separate reads
Atomic report index publication lacked complete Windows retry and validation
Standard wheel and source build surfaces were disabled
Package metadata described an obsolete Foundation skeleton
Public entry points advertised inactive API and worker runtimes
Primary documentation described an obsolete hosted product
Release branch had no current main ancestry
Release workflow tested the retired localhost HTTP runtime
Installed launcher could request a package-only installer absent from the installed copy
Wheel test depended on globally preinstalled setuptools
Persistence self-test failed on equivalent Windows long and 8.3 paths

external_release_boundaries.title: Physical installation and real-report pilot on target computer
Applicable tax regime and tax base confirmation
Explicit decision to merge PR #102 into main
